objective: Validate trend/rebound setup classification against raw price structure
background: Setup classification may not reflect actual price behavior: 84 currently open/pending trades — setup classification should be validated.
constraints: Do not change live trading thresholds
Do not modify position sizing or risk floor
Do not modify alphaScore or triggerScore weighting without evidence
Diagnostics and reports only — no automated strategy changes
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Sample 20 recent trend and 20 recent rebound closed trades
For each: compute MA5/MA20 alignment, 5-day return before entry, volume confirmation ratio
Report trades where MA structure contradicts the assigned setupType
Add confusion-matrix table (setupType vs MA-regime) to docs/reports/setup_audit.json
No automatic reclassification of existing trades
required_outputs: Sample 20 recent trend and 20 recent rebound closed trades
For each: compute MA5/MA20 alignment, 5-day return before entry, volume confirmation ratio
Report trades where MA structure contradicts the assigned setupType
Add confusion-matrix table (setupType vs MA-regime) to docs/reports/setup_audit.json
No automatic reclassification of existing trades
forbidden_changes: Do not change live trading thresholds
Do not modify position sizing or risk floor
Do not modify alphaScore or triggerScore weighting without evidence
Diagnostics and reports only — no automated strategy changes
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
